description: With more than {yearsExperience} years of experience across software engineering, application support, IT programming, and ESB development, I build reliable backend and middleware solutions using the Microsoft ecosystem, IBM products, and tools such as Redis and Elasticsearch. I enjoy learning new technologies, improving existing systems, and finding better ways to solve real-world problems.
detailOrQuote: I believe technology should make work simpler, systems more resilient, and digital experiences more accessible. That mindset keeps me learning, experimenting, and turning complex problems into reliable solutions.
